overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The vehicle navigates neon-lit intersections, passes beneath elevated metro tracks, and traverses industrial districts with distinctive dome-shaped buildings, showcasing the game's high-fidelity cinematic rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection beneath elevated metro tracks

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicle begins accelerating
vehicle initiates left turn at intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at red light then accelerating through the intersection and executing a left turn

notable_agents.action: black sedan passing through the intersection from the left

entered.detail: suspended traffic signal showing red light at the intersection
tall futuristic tower with distinctive red vertical lighting accents
curved elevated train track structure spanning the intersection
illuminated commercial advertisement with circular logo

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stationary view from inside a vehicle waiting at a red light in a rain-slicked cyberpunk intersection. A massive skyscraper with red accent lighting dominates the background beneath an elevated metro track. As the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates forward and begins a left turn, passing a neon billboard on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane avenue with elevated metro tracks overhead

events.description: completing left turn onto San Joaquin street with elevated tracks becoming prominent on left

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily down the avenue maintaining speed with moderate traffic

entered.detail: street sign with white text on dark background indicating San Joaquin street
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated track structure
bright green and red neon signs on commercial building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle completes its left turn onto San Joaquin street, where the elevated metro track now runs prominently along the left side supported by massive concrete pillars. Neon signage illuminates the commercial buildings on the right while the vehicle maintains a steady speed through the moderately trafficked avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with distinctive domed buildings

events.description: vehicle executes right turn at intersection entering industrial area
entering industrial zone with large dome-shaped buildings and billboard walls

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and navigating through narrower industrial streets

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large industrial structures with distinctive rounded dome roofs and red accent lighting
long wall covered with multiple illuminated advertisement posters
tall electrical transmission tower with multiple cables

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right into an industrial district characterized by large dome-shaped buildings with warm accent lighting on the right. A long wall of illuminated advertising billboards lines the left side of the street, while electrical transmission towers rise in the background, creating a grittier urban atmosphere distinct from the commercial avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection approach with traffic control and crosswalks

events.description: approaching red traffic light at intersection
vehicle decelerates and comes to complete stop at red light

agents.ego_description: slowing down and stopping at the red traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on the left side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a final intersection, slowing down as it nears a red traffic light. Crosswalk markings become visible on the wet road surface, and a large digital billboard stands on the left. The vehicle comes to a complete stop at the light, ending the drive through the neon-lit cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked metropolis that shifts from a dense commercial center to a grittier industrial district. It begins from inside a vehicle waiting at a red light beneath an elevated metro track and a red-lit skyscraper, accelerating forward into a left turn past a glowing neon billboard. As the vehicle enters San Joaquin street, the perspective follows the concrete pillars of the metro line on the left while neon signage from commercial buildings illuminates the right. The scene then shifts as the vehicle turns right, leaving the commercial avenue for an industrial zone defined by large dome-shaped buildings and towering electrical transmission towers. Finally, the camera slows as it approaches a final intersection, gliding over wet crosswalk markings before coming to a complete stop at a red light beneath a large digital billboard.
